---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# installization

>Do not use the preview function in this installization file. copy to the terminal in this dir.

## RandomMeas

```{julia}
Pkg.activate(".")
using Pkg
Pkg.add("LanguageServer") 
Pkg.add("QuantumToolbox")
Pkg.add("LinearAlgebra")
Pkg.add("SparseArrays")
```
